formdata.description:
0 = Applied
1 = Shortlisted
2 = Interview Scheduled
3 = Interview Completed
4 = Selected
5 = Offer Sent
6 = Offer Accepted
7 = Offer Declined
8 = Rejected

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location 'https://admin.staffbook.in/api/v1/user/edit-profile-text' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_AUTH_TOKEN' \
--form 'first_name="John"' \
--form 'last_name="Doe"' \
--form 'bio="Experienced software developer with 8+ years in full stack development, passionate about creating scalable web applications and mentoring junior developers."' \
--form 'designation="Senior Developer"' \
--form 'description="Full stack developer with 5 years experience in PHP, JavaScript, and React. Led multiple successful projects from inception to deployment."' \
--form 'phone="9876543210"' \
--form 'country_code="+91"' \
--form 'city="Mumbai"' \
--form 'state="Maharashtra"' \
--form 'country="India"' \
--form 'address="123 Main Street, Andheri East"' \
--form 'dob="1990-01-01"' \
--form 'sex="1"' \
--form 'website="https://johndoe.com"' \
--form 'linkedin="https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe"' \
--form 'preferred_role="Senior Developer"' \
--form 'preferred_location="Mumbai"' \
--form 'preferred_latitude="19.0760"' \
--form 'preferred_longitude="72.8777"' \
--form 'work_email="john.doe@company.com"' \
--form 'work_phone="9876543210"' \
--form 'preferred_salary="1500000"' \
--form 'expected_salary="1800000"' \
--form 'expected_salary_currency="INR"' \
--form 'preferred_shift="Day"' \
--form 'job_type="Permanent"' \
--form 'work_status="Open to work"' \
--form 'total_experience_years="5"' \
--form 'total_experience_months="6"' \
--form 'current_salary="1200000"' \
--form 'current_salary_currency="INR"' \
--form 'notice_period_months="2"' \
--form 'linkedin_profile="https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe"' \
--form 'github_url="https://github.com/johndoe"' \
--form 'portfolio_url="https://johndoe.com"' \
--form 'skills=["PHP", "JavaScript", "MySQL", "React"]'

request.description: Get all jobs with comprehensive filtering options

formdata.value: I'm excited to apply for this position...

formdata.description: REQUIRED: ENUM values: Permanent, Contract, Temporary, Internship, Freelance, Part-time

formdata.value: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in PHP, Yii2, and MySQL. The candidate should have strong problem-solving skills and experience in building scalable web applications.
PHP, Flutter, MySQL, JavaScript, REST API, Git, Docker
formdata.description: OPTIONAL: Comma-separated or array of skills
REQUIRED: ENUM values: Work from office, Remote, Hybrid, Flexible
REQUIRED: Job location (e.g., Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Remote)
REQUIRED: ENUM values: Immediate Joiner, 15 days, 30 days, 45 days, 60 days, 90 days, Negotiable, Serving Notice Period
OPTIONAL: Full address for office location

formdata.value: ["What is your experience with Flutter?", "Describe a challenging project you worked on", "What is your notice period?"]
formdata.description: OPTIONAL: JSON array of screening questions
OPTIONAL: ENUM values: Draft, Active, Closed, Archived (default: Draft)
OPTIONAL: Company logo file (png, jpg, jpeg, gif, svg, max 5MB)
OPTIONAL: Job reel/video file (mp4, mov, avi, mkv, webm, max 50MB)
